title: openwebui-version-published
description: Cross-repo dispatch payload sent from flexion/open-webui's publish-flex-image.yml to flexion/flexion-open-webui-infra's open-version-bump-pr.yml after a successful ECR push. The single inter-repo data wire defined in the auto-upgrade pipeline phase 1 design doc.

version.description: Upstream open-webui release tag, verbatim (keep the leading v).

digest.description: ECR imageDigest captured at push (sha256 hex).

environment.description: Target environment. Phase 1 only ever fires for dev; the receiver refuses anything else.

upstream_changelog_url.description: Operator-readable link to the upstream release page.
